parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, error: $json.error, message: $json.error_message, data: null }) }}

parameters.content:
## ENTRY POINT

***Receives POST to /dayoff-submit. Payload: employee_id, employee_name, request_date, reason, notes.***

## DATA FETCH 1

***Reads Employees sheet. Validates employee ID and pulls name, department, position for the AI prompt.***

## DATA FETCH 2

***Reads Shifts sheet. Checks if the employee is already scheduled to work on the requested day-off date.***

## DATA FETCH 3 

***Reads DayOff_Requests sheet — all approved & pending records used for duplicate, weekly limit, and capacity checks.***

## 7 DAY VALIDATOR

***Checks: duplicate, pending duplicate, shift conflict, max 2 off/day, consecutive days off, weekly limit (1/week), same weekday repeat. Finds up to 5 alt dates.***

## INPUT GATE
***Checks if employee exists and date is valid & not in the past. True → AI chain. False → instant HTTP 400 error response.***

## LLM PROVIDER 

***Same GLM-4.5 model, temp 0.3. Provides language intelligence for the AI Decision chain below.***

## VALIDATION ERROR

***Returns HTTP 400 with error code (INVALID_EMPLOYEE, INVALID_DATE, PAST_DATE) and a human-readable message.***

## AI ANALYSIS

***Sends all 7 conflict results to GLM-4.5. Strict rules: empty conflicts → APPROVE, any conflict → REJECTED. Returns JSON with warm message & suggested date.***

## AI OUTPUT PARSER

***Strips markdown, extracts JSON. Sets can_submit=true if decision is APPROVE. Falls back to automated message if AI response is malformed.***

## FINAL BRANCH

***Checks can_submit flag. True → save as Approved + 200 OK. False → save as Rejected + 200 with rejection reason & alternatives.***

## REPORT APPROVED 

***Appends to DayOff_Requests with status=Approved. Saves employee ID/name, date, reason, timestamp, AI manager note.***

## APPROVED REPLY

***Returns success=true, status="approved", AI warm message, employee data, date, and list of other available alternatives.***

## RECORD REJECTED

***Appends to DayOff_Requests with status=Rejected. Same fields saved so managers can review rejection history.***

## REJECTION REPLY

***Returns success=false, status="rejected", AI message explaining which rule failed, suggested_date, and up to 5 alternative dates.***
